change_note: iob_decay_minutes reduced from 220 to 150. Observed 2026-04-15: 20u at 12:21 local, glucose arrested around 14:00-14:15 local (~110-115 min), consistent with ~150 min total duration. At 138 min the 220-min model predicted 25% remaining (5u IOB) but clinically insulin appeared finished. 150-min model predicts 8% (1.6u) at that point, matching observation. Fast phase unchanged at 0-90 min; slow phase now spans 90-150 min.

history.change: GSF changed to 4.0, ICR to 1.5, baseline to 120
Split into parameters and behavior rules files. ICR 1.5, GSF 3.7, baseline 120 carried forward.

ICR 1.5->1.2 (underdosing observed across multiple meals). Bilinear IOB decay adopted (fast phase 0-90min, slow phase 90-220min). gsf_sensitivity_compression_k=0.02 added dormant for future glucose-dependent GSF calibration. Rc scope hardened to correction-only - was incorrectly applied to full dose sum in some calculations.

HSF_max=0.30 added. Uncapped HSF at delta=133 produced (1+0.665)=1.665 multiplier causing 92u output - clearly wrong. Cap limits HSF amplification to 30% maximum regardless of delta. Sanity check threshold set: flag only if single bolus exceeds 60u OR dose is more than 2x the largest dose in the past 7 days.

iob_decay_minutes 220->150. Clinical observation 2026-04-15: insulin action appeared complete ~110-115 min post-dose, inconsistent with 220-min model. 150-min bilinear (fast 0-90, slow 90-150) fits observed trajectory. Single data point - monitor and adjust if needed.
